settings.title: Monster Piercing | Gold Flatbacks
settings.text:
Elevate your style with our Gold Flat Back Studs Collection, featuring push fit and threaded studs in luxurious 14K and 9K gold. Designed for comfort and beauty, each stud offers a secure fit and a dainty, minimalist look, perfect for ear, cartilage, tragus, and helix piercings.

Crafted with precision and hypoallergenic materials, these pieces are made to shine effortlessly from day to night. Choose from classic gold balls, sparkling crystal studs, and delicate motifs that reflect your personal style. Perfect for those who love subtle luxury and trendy body jewellery that never goes out of fashion.

settings.question: What’s the difference between threadless and internally threaded flatbacks?
settings.answer:
• Threadless flatbacks use a tension-fit post and pin system. The decorative end slides into the post and stays secure through pressure, making them easy to insert and remove without
    twisting.
  • Internally threaded flatbacks have
    a post with internal threads and a screw-on top, ensuring a very secure fit and
    smooth insertion.

Both options provide a secure, professional-grade hold — the choice depends on
personal preference or studio standards.

settings.question: How do I know the gold is authentic?
settings.answer: All our gold jewellery is genuine 14K solid gold and quality-checked before shipment. Each item meets strict purity standards and contains a gold hallmark for authenticity. We also have certificates upon customers’ request for all our items.

settings.question: How should I care for my gold body jewellery?
settings.answer: Clean your 14K gold jewellery with mild soap and warm water, then gently dry with a soft cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasive cloths to maintain its shine. Store your pieces in a dry place to prevent scratching.

settings.question: What piercing types can flatbacks be used for?
settings.answer: Gold flatbacks are suitable for a variety of piercings including helix, tragus, conch, lobe, lip, and cartilage piercings. Their flat base makes them especially comfortable for areas where jewellery sits close to the skin.
